title: RispwindPack FABRIC
description: A collection of all Rispwind Mods, alongside Just Enough Items for recipe browsing.
body:
A mod collection including all current Fabric mods created by me, Rispwind.

Features extra paintings, an adorable new mob, spawns eggs in trades, and the USB Charger from a past April Fool's snapshot.

Also comes bundled with Just Enough Items for convenience.
